de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.instantiator

Interface ChoicePoint


  • public interface ChoicePoint
    Interface encapsulating points during the evaluation of a feature term where it is either possible to take different branches, or where the feature has to change the rule application in question (e.g. by instantiation schema variables).

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Iterator<CPBranch> getBranches(RuleApp oldApp)
      Obtain the branches that can be taken at this point.

    • Method Detail

      • getBranches

        java.util.Iterator<CPBranch> getBranches(RuleApp oldApp)
        Obtain the branches that can be taken at this point.
        Parameters:
        oldApp - the current rule application, which can already have been modified by earlier ChoicePoints
        Returns:
        an iterator over the branches of the ChoicePoint
